output.content: {"posts":[{"id":"DAY3-022","author":"ElaraJ_84","text":"Still getting these weird DMs from 'Sarah' about our time in university. It's been three months since I blocked her and she keeps finding a way to contact me through different accounts. Yesterday she sent the same photo of us at the pub with a caption saying she misses me. I've reported it but I don't know what else to do.","category":"Harassment","correctAction":"Escalate","difficulty":"Medium","explanation":"This case requires specialist investigation due to evidence of persistent, unwanted contact across multiple accounts after a block request, which meets the criteria for escalation under HarassmentAbuse.","day":3,"correctEscalationReason":"HarassmentAbuse","acceptableEscalationReasons":[],"allowNeedsReviewEscalation":false,"isStoryPost":false}]}
